GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[], aggr=[count(*)]
  GpuCoalescePartitionsExec
    GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[], aggr=[count(*)]
      GpuProjectExec: expr=[]
        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=67108864
          GpuFilterExec: predicate=c_acctbal@0 > Some(0),15,2
            GpuScanExec: batch_size=67108864
--- memory ---
total_estimate_cost=138
GpuAggregateExec: row_width=8, subtree_max_row_bytes=32, estimate_input_bytes=8, estimate_output_bytes=8, estimate_cost=16
  GpuCoalescePartitionsExec: row_width=8, subtree_max_row_bytes=32, estimate_input_bytes=8, estimate_output_bytes=8, estimate_cost=16
    GpuAggregateExec: row_width=8, subtree_max_row_bytes=32, estimate_input_bytes=1, estimate_output_bytes=8, estimate_cost=9
      GpuProjectExec: row_width=1, subtree_max_row_bytes=32, estimate_input_bytes=16, estimate_output_bytes=1, estimate_cost=17
        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=16, subtree_max_row_bytes=32, estimate_input_bytes=16, estimate_output_bytes=16, estimate_cost=32
          GpuFilterExec: row_width=16, subtree_max_row_bytes=32, estimate_input_bytes=16, estimate_output_bytes=16, estimate_cost=32
            GpuScanExec: row_width=16, subtree_max_row_bytes=16, estimate_input_bytes=0, estimate_output_bytes=16, estimate_cost=16
